fontWeight.$description: Badge label font weight across all colours.

radius.$description: Default badge corner radius — pill shape.

radiusFull.$description: LG badge radius when pill shaped.

radiusSquare.$description: LG badge radius when square shaped.
MD badge radius when square shaped.

radiusFull.$description: SM badge radius when pill shaped.

radiusSquare.$description: SM badge radius when square shaped.

contentDisabled.$description: Destructive primary button label when disabled.

fill.$description: Destructive primary button background at rest.

fillActive.$description: Destructive primary button background when pressed.

fillDisabled.$description: Destructive primary button background when disabled.

fillHover.$description: Destructive primary button background on hover.

iconDisabled.$description: Destructive primary button icon when disabled.

border.$description: Destructive ghost button border at rest.

borderDisabled.$description: Destructive ghost button border when disabled.

borderWidth.$description: Destructive ghost button border stroke width.

contentDisabled.$description: Destructive ghost button label when disabled.

fill.$description: Destructive ghost button background at rest.

fillActive.$description: Destructive ghost button background when pressed.

fillDisabled.$description: Destructive ghost button background when disabled.

fillHover.$description: Destructive ghost button background on hover.

iconDisabled.$description: Destructive ghost button icon when disabled.

border.$description: Destructive secondary (outlined) button border at rest.

borderDisabled.$description: Destructive secondary (outlined) button border when disabled.

borderWidth.$description: Destructive secondary (outlined) button border stroke width.

contentDisabled.$description: Destructive secondary (outlined) button label when disabled.

fill.$description: Destructive secondary (outlined) button background at rest.

fillActive.$description: Destructive secondary (outlined) button background when pressed.

fillDisabled.$description: Destructive secondary (outlined) button background when disabled.

fillHover.$description: Destructive secondary (outlined) button background on hover.

iconDisabled.$description: Destructive secondary (outlined) button icon when disabled.

focusRingWidth.$description: Width of the keyboard focus ring around all button variants.

fontWeight.$description: Font weight applied to all button labels regardless of size.

contentDisabled.$description: Ghost button label colour when disabled.

fill.$description: Ghost button background at rest — transparent.

iconDisabled.$description: Ghost button icon colour when disabled.

paddingX.$description: XS ghost button horizontal padding — narrower than filled.

content.$description: Primary button label and icon colour at rest and hover.

contentDisabled.$description: Primary button label colour when disabled.

iconDisabled.$description: Primary button icon colour when disabled.

contentDisabled.$description: Secondary button label colour when disabled.

fill.$description: Secondary (outlined) button background at rest — typically transparent.

iconDisabled.$description: Secondary button icon colour when disabled.

labelWrapperPaddingX.$description: LG inner label wrapper horizontal padding.

height.$description: MD button total height — default button size.

labelWrapperPaddingX.$description: MD inner label wrapper horizontal padding.
SM inner label wrapper horizontal padding.

iconOnlyPadding.$description: XS icon-only button padding on all sides.

labelWrapperPaddingX.$description: XS inner label wrapper horizontal padding.

contentDisabled.$description: Tonal button label colour when disabled.

iconDisabled.$description: Tonal button icon colour when disabled.

gap.$description: Vertical gap between content sections inside a card.

padding.$description: Inner padding on all sides of a card.

borderColor.$description: Default border color of the checkbox input box (rest, unchecked). Aliases input/borderColor.

borderError.$description: Border color of the checkbox input box in error semantic state. Aliases input/borderColorError.

borderErrorHover.$description: Border color of the checkbox input box on hover in error state (darker red). Aliases color/errorPressed.

borderHover.$description: Border color of the checkbox input box on hover. Aliases input/borderColorHover.

borderWarning.$description: Border color of the checkbox input box in warning semantic state. Aliases color/warning.

borderWarningHover.$description: Border color of the checkbox input box on hover in warning state. Aliases color/errorPressed — replace with a warning-pressed token if added to semantic collection.

borderWidth.$description: Border width of the checkbox input box and button container. Aliases input/borderWidth.

checked.$description: Checkbox fill colour when checked — uses brand primary.

checkedDisabled.$description: Fill color of the checkbox input box when checked and disabled. Aliases color/contentDisabledStrong.

checkedHover.$description: Checkbox fill on hover when checked.

containerRadius.$description: Border radius of the checkbox button container (outer row). Aliases input/size/md/radius.

cornerRadius.$description: Horizontal click-target padding around the checkbox.

fill.$description: Default background of the checkbox button container (unchecked). Aliases input/containerColor.

fillDisabled.$description: Background of the checkbox button container when disabled. Aliases input/containerColorDisabled.

fillHover.$description: Background of the checkbox button container on hover (unchecked). Aliases input/containerColorFilled.

focusRingError.$description: Focus ring color around the checkbox input box in error semantic state. Aliases color/status/error/border.

gap.$description: Vertical click-target padding around the checkbox.

paddingX.$description: Horizontal click-target padding around the checkbox.

paddingYDefault.$description: Vertical click-target padding around the checkbox.

minHeight.$description: Minimum height (48px) of the Lg checkbox button container. Ensures single-line height while allowing growth for a second label line. Aliases input/size/lg/height.
Minimum height (40px) of the Md checkbox button container. Ensures single-line height while allowing growth for a second label line. Aliases input/size/md/height.
Minimum height (32px) of the Sm checkbox button container. Ensures single-line height while allowing growth for a second label line. Aliases input/size/sm/height.

warningHoverColor.$description: Checkbox colour in warning / invalid hover state.

fill.$description: Outlined chip background at rest — transparent.

radius.$description: Chip corner radius — pill shape by default.

borderFocus.$description: Input border when focused — should contrast strongly with the surface.

content.$description: Floating or static label text colour.

fillFilled.$description: Input background when it has a value (filled variant).

helper.$description: Helper / hint text below the input.

placeholder.$description: Placeholder text colour before the user types.

borderColor.$description: Default border color of the radio circle (unchecked default, focus unchecked).

borderHover.$description: Border color when radio is checked AND focused. Slightly stronger to signal active + focused state.

borderWidth.$description: Stroke width of the radio circle border.

fill.$description: Background fill of the radio circle. Neutral surface — consistent with other input components.

fillError.$description: Fill of the inner dot in error state. Matches error border for visual consistency.

indicator.$description: Fill of the inner dot when radio is checked. Uses brand primary — adapts per brand theme via semantic layer.

borderColor.$description: Default and focus border color. Aliases input/borderColor → color/outline.

borderDisabled.$description: Border color in disabled state. Aliases input/borderColorDisabled → color/outlineVariant.

borderError.$description: Border color in error state. Aliases input/borderColorError → color/error.

borderRadius.$description: Corner radius of the container. Aliases semantic radius/sm (4px). Brands can override via radius/sm.

borderWidth.$description: Stroke width of the container border. Aliases input/borderWidth → borderWidth/sm.

content.$description: Color of the floating label and prepend text. Aliases color/text/secondary. Brand-aware via semantic layer.

fill.$description: Background fill of the select/combobox container. Aliases input/containerColor → color/surface (white).

icon.$description: Color of the chevron icon. Aliases color/icon/secondary. Brand-aware via semantic layer.

iconSize.$description: Fixed size of the trailing chevron icon (16px). Aliases global spacing/16.

paddingRight.$description: Right padding (all sizes, 8px) — kept narrow to accommodate the chevron icon. Aliases global spacing/8.

gap.$description: Gap between elements in the content row for Large size (12px). Aliases global spacing/12.

minHeight.$description: Minimum height for Large size (40px). Aliases input/size/md/height. Grows to accommodate 2-line content.

paddingLeft.$description: Left padding for Large size (16px). Aliases global spacing/16.

paddingY.$description: Vertical padding for Large (9.5px each side). Derived from: (minHeight 40px − single-line content 21px) / 2. Update if minHeight changes.

gap.$description: Gap between elements in the content row for Medium size (8px). Aliases global spacing/8.

minHeight.$description: Minimum height for Medium size (36px). Aliases global spacing/36. Add a semantic component height token if brand variation is needed.

paddingLeft.$description: Left padding for Medium size (12px). Aliases global spacing/12.

paddingY.$description: Vertical padding for Medium (7.5px each side). Derived from: (minHeight 36px − single-line content 21px) / 2. Update if minHeight changes.

gap.$description: Gap between elements in the content row for Small size (6px). Aliases global spacing/6.

minHeight.$description: Minimum height for Small size (32px). Aliases input/size/sm/height. Grows to accommodate 2-line content.

paddingLeft.$description: Left padding for Small size (8px). Aliases global spacing/8.

paddingY.$description: Vertical padding for Small (5.5px each side). Derived from: (minHeight 32px − single-line content 21px) / 2. Update if minHeight changes.

value.$description: Color of the selected value text. Aliases color/text/primary. Brand-aware via semantic layer.

maxWidth.$description: Maximum tooltip width in pixels before text wraps.

lg.$description: Heavy 4px border — strong emphasis strokes, thick separators.

md.$description: Emphasis 2px border — avatar ring, focus ring width.

none.$description: No border — 0px stroke. Resets borders on interactive elements.

sm.$description: Standard 1px border — inputs, cards, alerts, chips.

1.$description: Primary data series colour — first dataset in charts and graphs.

2.$description: Secondary data series colour — second dataset in charts and graphs.

background.$description: Default surface — card and panel backgrounds, modal fill, input background at rest.

border.$description: Standard border — input outline at rest, card border.

border-focus.$description: Focus ring — keyboard-navigation focus indicator on any interactive element. Should be highly visible.

border-input.$description: Standard visible border — input border at rest, secondary button border, card outline.

border-input-focus.$description: Form control border when focused — strongest contrast to signal active state.

border-input-hover.$description: Form control border on pointer hover — darkens to signal interactivity.

border-inverse.$description: Border on dark/inverse surfaces — outline inside tooltips or dark cards.

border-strong.$description: Prominent border — focused input, hovered input, active dropdown.

border-subtle.$description: Hairline dividers — section separators, list item rule lines.

disabled.$description: Disabled text and icon on light surfaces — secondary, ghost and outlined disabled labels.

disabled-on-color.$description: Disabled text/icon on coloured or branded backgrounds — primary and tonal button disabled labels.

disabled-strong.$description: Disabled text and icon on coloured backgrounds — primary and tonal button disabled labels.

highlight.$description: Primary body text — headings, field labels, high-emphasis content.

on-brand.$description: Text on brand-coloured surfaces — labels inside branded chips, banners or highlighted rows.

placeholder.$description: Input placeholder — hint text shown before the user types.

primary.$description: Primary body text — headings, field labels, high-emphasis content.

secondary.$description: Secondary text — supporting descriptions, metadata, subheadings.

tertiary.$description: Tertiary text — timestamps, captions, low-priority hint text.

destructive.$description: Error fill — destructive button background, inline validation error indicator.

destructive-active.$description: Dark error fill for pressed state — destructive primary pressed.

destructive-content-disabled.$description: Disabled text and icon for destructive variants — on error-tinted disabled surfaces.

destructive-foreground.$description: Text and icons ON error fill — destructive button label and icon.

destructive-muted.$description: Error surface — destructive button hover background.

destructive-muted-foreground.$description: Text and icons ON errorContainer — error message body text.

foreground.$description: Primary content on surface — body text, default icon fill.

brand.$description: Icon in the brand colour — use for brand-specific icons or active-state indicators.

default.$description: High-emphasis icon — default fill alongside primary body text.

muted.$description: Medium-emphasis icon — supporting and trailing indicator icons.

inverse.$description: Dark surface on light theme — tooltips, snackbars, inverse cards.

inverse-foreground.$description: Text on dark or inverse surfaces — labels inside tooltips or snackbars.

default.$description: Amber label — Mid-tone fill — badge icon or accent dot.

muted.$description: Amber label — Light tinted border — badge and tag border.

on.$description: Amber label — Text or icon directly on a filled badge background.

strong.$description: Amber label — Dark tinted text — badge label text.

subtle.$description: Amber label — Very light tinted background — badge and tag background.

default.$description: Blue label — Mid-tone fill — badge icon or accent dot.

muted.$description: Blue label — Light tinted border — badge and tag border.

on.$description: Blue label — Text or icon directly on a filled badge background.

strong.$description: Blue label — Dark tinted text — badge label text.

subtle.$description: Blue label — Very light tinted background — badge and tag background.

default.$description: Brand label — Mid-tone fill — badge icon or accent dot.

muted.$description: Brand label — Light tinted border — badge and tag border.

on.$description: Brand label — Text or icon directly on a filled badge background.

strong.$description: Brand label — Dark tinted text — badge label text.

subtle.$description: Brand label — Very light tinted background — badge and tag background.

default.$description: Green label — Mid-tone fill — badge icon or accent dot.

muted.$description: Green label — Light tinted border — badge and tag border.

on.$description: Green label — Text or icon directly on a filled badge background.

strong.$description: Green label — Dark tinted text — badge label text.

subtle.$description: Green label — Very light tinted background — badge and tag background.

default.$description: Orange label — Mid-tone fill — badge icon or accent dot.

muted.$description: Orange label — Light tinted border — badge and tag border.

on.$description: Orange label — Text or icon directly on a filled badge background.

strong.$description: Orange label — Dark tinted text — badge label text.

subtle.$description: Orange label — Very light tinted background — badge and tag background.

default.$description: Purple label — Mid-tone fill — badge icon or accent dot.

muted.$description: Purple label — Light tinted border — badge and tag border.

on.$description: Purple label — Text or icon directly on a filled badge background.

strong.$description: Purple label — Dark tinted text — badge label text.

subtle.$description: Purple label — Very light tinted background — badge and tag background.

default.$description: Red label — Mid-tone fill — badge icon or accent dot.

muted.$description: Red label — Light tinted border — badge and tag border.

on.$description: Red label — Text or icon directly on a filled badge background.

strong.$description: Red label — Dark tinted text — badge label text.

subtle.$description: Red label — Very light tinted background — badge and tag background.

default.$description: Slate label — Mid-tone fill — badge icon or accent dot.

muted.$description: Slate label — Light tinted border — badge and tag border.

on.$description: Slate label — Text or icon directly on a filled badge background.

strong.$description: Slate label — Dark tinted text — badge label text.

subtle.$description: Slate label — Very light tinted background — badge and tag background.

muted.$description: Alternate quiet surface — disabled input background, disabled button container.

muted-foreground.$description: Secondary content on surfaceVariant — helper text, input placeholder (use color/text/placeholder instead where available).

none.$description: Transparent fill — ghost buttons and outlined chips with no background. Becomes visible on hover.

overlay.$description: Scrim overlay that covers content behind a modal or drawer.

primary.$description: Brand fill — primary buttons, FAB, active nav indicators, progress bars. Changes per brand mode.

primary-active.$description: Primary fill when pressed or active — pressed primary button, active tab.

primary-foreground.$description: Text and icons placed ON the primary fill. Must achieve 4.5:1 contrast with color/primary.

primary-hover.$description: Primary fill on pointer hover — hover state for primary buttons.

primary-muted.$description: Low-emphasis brand surface — tonal buttons, selected chips, brand-tinted cards.

primary-muted-active.$description: PrimaryContainer when pressed — tonal button and chip active background.

primary-muted-foreground.$description: Text and icons ON primaryContainer — tonal button labels, chip labels.

primary-muted-hover.$description: PrimaryContainer on hover — tonal button and chip hover background.

secondary.$description: Supporting action color — secondary button border and label, outlined variants.

secondary-active.$description: SecondaryContainer when pressed — filter chip active background.

secondary-foreground.$description: Text and icons ON secondary fill.

secondary-hover.$description: Surface hover — table row hover, list item hover, ghost button hover.

secondary-pressed.$description: Supporting action color — secondary button border and label, outlined variants.

surface.$description: Page-level canvas background — sits behind all cards and panels.

surface-foreground.$description: Text and icons ON secondaryContainer — filter chip labels, pill text.

full.$description: Pill shape — badges, chips, avatars, toggle switches. Both brands: 9999px.

lg.$description: Large rounding — md/lg buttons, cards, alerts, standard inputs. JIT 8px / Brand 2px.

md.$description: Standard rounding — xs/sm buttons, tooltips, small inputs. JIT 6px / Brand 0px.

none.$description: No rounding — completely square corners. Both brands: 0px.

sm.$description: Slight rounding — small chips, inner elements. JIT 4px / Brand 0px.

xl.$description: Extra-large rounding — popovers, modals. Both brands: 12px.

xs.$description: Minimal rounding — small tags, square badges. JIT 2px / Brand 0px.

control.$description: Elevation for form controls (e.g. checkbox). Both brands: shadow.sm.

overlay.$description: Elevation for floating transient content (menus, popovers, toasts). Both brands: shadow.md.

modal.$description: Elevation for blocking modal surfaces (dialogs, drawers). Both brands: shadow.lg.

2xl.$description: 2× extra-large padding — maximum component inner spacing. JIT 32px / Brand 28px.

2xs.$description: Inner gap, xs ghost button padding
Minimum component height — small dot badges, icons. JIT 20px / Brand 16px.

lg.$description: LG component height — md button, md input. JIT 40px / Brand 32px.

md.$description: MD component height — sm button, md chip, sm input. JIT 32px / Brand 28px.

sm.$description: SM component height — xs button, lg badge. JIT 28px / Brand 24px.

xl.$description: XL component height — lg button, lg input. JIT 48px / Brand 40px.

xs.$description: XS component height — xs avatar, compact badge. JIT 24px / Brand 20px.

lg.$description: Large padding — lg button horizontal padding, card gap, alert padding. JIT 16px / Brand 12px.

md.$description: Medium padding — md/lg button padding, chip padding, tooltip horizontal padding. JIT 12px / Brand 10px.

sm.$description: Small padding — sm/md button padding, input padding, badge and tooltip padding. JIT 8px / Brand 6px.

xl.$description: Extra-large padding — card padding. JIT 24px / Brand 20px.

xs.$description: Extra-small padding — xs/sm button vertical padding, badge padding. JIT 4px / Brand 3px.

2xl.$description: Maximum layout spacing — full-page sections. JIT 96px / Brand 80px.

lg.$description: Large layout spacing — page section gaps, sidebar gutters. JIT 48px / Brand 32px.

md.$description: Default layout spacing — standard section padding. JIT 32px / Brand 24px.

sm.$description: Small layout spacing — compact section padding. JIT 24px / Brand 20px.

xl.$description: Extra-large layout spacing — page hero padding. JIT 64px / Brand 48px.

xs.$description: Minimum layout gap — tight section padding, small gutters. JIT 16px / Brand 12px.

fontFamily.$description: Body LG typeface — varies per brand.

fontSize.$description: Body LG size — 20px. Long-form editorial body text.

fontFamily.$description: Body MD typeface — varies per brand.

fontSize.$description: Body MD size — 16px. Default paragraph and UI body text.

fontFamily.$description: Body SM typeface — varies per brand.

fontSize.$description: Body SM size — 14px. Secondary descriptions, input helper text.

fontFamily.$description: Body XS typeface — varies per brand.

fontSize.$description: Body XS size — 12px. Fine print, footnotes.

fontFamily.$description: Display 2XL typeface — varies per brand mode.

fontSize.$description: Display 2XL size — 72px. For hero headlines only.

fontFamily.$description: Display LG typeface — varies per brand.
Display MD typeface — varies per brand.
Display XL typeface — varies per brand.
Heading LG typeface — varies per brand.
Heading MD typeface — varies per brand.

fontSize.$description: Heading MD size — 20px. Card titles, panel h3.

fontFamily.$description: Heading SM typeface — varies per brand.

fontSize.$description: Heading SM size — 16px. Widget titles, sidebar h4.

fontFamily.$description: Heading XL typeface — varies per brand.
Label LG typeface — varies per brand.

fontSize.$description: Label LG size — 16px. Md/lg button labels, input field labels.

lineHeight.$description: Label LG line-height — 20px. Same across brands after bug fix.

fontFamily.$description: Label MD typeface — varies per brand.

fontSize.$description: Label MD size — 14px. Sm button labels, chip labels.

fontWeight.$description: Label MD weight — regular (JIT) / medium (Brand). Per-brand weight differentiation.

fontFamily.$description: Label SM typeface — varies per brand.

fontSize.$description: Label SM size — 12px. XS button labels, badge text, tooltip text.

fontFamily.$description: Link LG typeface — inherits from bodyLg, varies per brand.

fontWeight.$description: Link LG weight — medium (500). Slightly heavier than body to signal interactivity.

fontFamily.$description: Link MD typeface — inherits from bodyMd, varies per brand.

fontSize.$description: Link MD size — 16px. Default inline link.

fontFamily.$description: Link SM typeface — inherits from bodySm, varies per brand.

fontSize.$description: Link SM size — 14px. Small inline link.

fontFamily.$description: Link XS typeface — inherits from bodyXs, varies per brand.
Overline typeface — varies per brand.

fontSize.$description: Overline size — 12px. Section label above headings, category markers.

fontWeight.$description: Overline weight — bold (700). Visually distinct from body text.
